## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Prophecy and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, performance, and upcoming plans.](https://fathom.video/share/JfbxwnHa4o9nCaP4svPNw3xNYHsuFr9i?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Prophecy attending major Databricks conference; potential for content repurposing](https://fathom.video/share/JfbxwnHa4o9nCaP4svPNw3xNYHsuFr9i?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)
  - [SEO performance strong with new highs in views/sessions; GSC data issues noted](https://fathom.video/share/JfbxwnHa4o9nCaP4svPNw3xNYHsuFr9i?tab=summary&timestamp=625.0)
  - [GrowthX conducting internal audit next week; content production to slow temporarily](https://fathom.video/share/JfbxwnHa4o9nCaP4svPNw3xNYHsuFr9i?tab=summary&timestamp=940.0)
  - [Discussions on AI/LLM impact on content consumption and visibility metrics](https://fathom.video/share/JfbxwnHa4o9nCaP4svPNw3xNYHsuFr9i?tab=summary&timestamp=749.0)

## Topics

### Conference Content Repurposing

  - [Prophecy attending Databricks' biggest annual event (Data + AI Summit)](https://fathom.video/share/JfbxwnHa4o9nCaP4svPNw3xNYHsuFr9i?tab=summary&timestamp=89.0)
  - [GrowthX offered to help repurpose conference content (e.g., recordings)](https://fathom.video/share/JfbxwnHa4o9nCaP4svPNw3xNYHsuFr9i?tab=summary&timestamp=161.0)
  - [Priority for next couple weeks; may bump other work (e.g., blogs) as needed](https://fathom.video/share/JfbxwnHa4o9nCaP4svPNw3xNYHsuFr9i?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)

### SEO Performance & Metrics

  - [New highs in views and sessions (GA4 data)](https://fathom.video/share/JfbxwnHa4o9nCaP4svPNw3xNYHsuFr9i?tab=summary&timestamp=625.0)
  - [Top articles: data engineering skills, data mesh principles, types of analytics, medallion architecture](https://fathom.video/share/JfbxwnHa4o9nCaP4svPNw3xNYHsuFr9i?tab=summary&timestamp=632.0)
  - [LLM referral traffic increasing, notably for ETL/ELT and batch/stream processing](https://fathom.video/share/JfbxwnHa4o9nCaP4svPNw3xNYHsuFr9i?tab=summary&timestamp=666.0)
  - [27 blog pages appearing in AI overviews for 163 keywords (61k+ volume)](https://fathom.video/share/JfbxwnHa4o9nCaP4svPNw3xNYHsuFr9i?tab=summary&timestamp=1278.0)
  - [Return direct traffic increased (volatile metric, but trending positively)](https://fathom.video/share/JfbxwnHa4o9nCaP4svPNw3xNYHsuFr9i?tab=summary&timestamp=1316.0)

### Content Strategy & Tools

  - [Internal linking strategy planned for top-performing articles](https://fathom.video/share/JfbxwnHa4o9nCaP4svPNw3xNYHsuFr9i?tab=summary&timestamp=648.0)
  - [Exploring Scrunch tool for LLM visibility measurement](https://fathom.video/share/JfbxwnHa4o9nCaP4svPNw3xNYHsuFr9i?tab=summary&timestamp=905.0)
  - [Discussion on evolving SEO landscape (e.g., Jasper's SEMrush integration)](https://fathom.video/share/JfbxwnHa4o9nCaP4svPNw3xNYHsuFr9i?tab=summary&timestamp=1164.0)
  - [GrowthX committed to staying competitive with new tools/strategies](https://fathom.video/share/JfbxwnHa4o9nCaP4svPNw3xNYHsuFr9i?tab=summary&timestamp=794.0)

### Operational Updates

  - [6 articles published last week, 5 more delivered for review](https://fathom.video/share/JfbxwnHa4o9nCaP4svPNw3xNYHsuFr9i?tab=summary&timestamp=706.0)
  - [11 proposed topics pending approval](https://fathom.video/share/JfbxwnHa4o9nCaP4svPNw3xNYHsuFr9i?tab=summary&timestamp=1396.0)
  - [GrowthX conducting internal audit next week; content production/publishing to slow](https://fathom.video/share/JfbxwnHa4o9nCaP4svPNw3xNYHsuFr9i?tab=summary&timestamp=940.0)

### Challenges

  - [Evan (Prophecy team member) overloaded with tasks; potential need for more hours or dedicated MOPS person](https://fathom.video/share/JfbxwnHa4o9nCaP4svPNw3xNYHsuFr9i?tab=summary&timestamp=1468.0)
  - [Qualified Dashboard data needed by end of month for quarterly review](https://fathom.video/share/JfbxwnHa4o9nCaP4svPNw3xNYHsuFr9i?tab=summary&timestamp=1457.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Cody to review and approve remaining proposed topics](https://fathom.video/share/JfbxwnHa4o9nCaP4svPNw3xNYHsuFr9i?tab=summary&timestamp=1402.0)

  - [Cody to follow up with Evan about Qualified Dashboard data on Monday](https://fathom.video/share/JfbxwnHa4o9nCaP4svPNw3xNYHsuFr9i?tab=summary&timestamp=1454.0)
  - [GrowthX to double up content production after audit week](https://fathom.video/share/JfbxwnHa4o9nCaP4svPNw3xNYHsuFr9i?tab=summary&timestamp=1448.0)
  - [Potential exploration of increasing Evan's hours or hiring dedicated MOPS person](https://fathom.video/share/JfbxwnHa4o9nCaP4svPNw3xNYHsuFr9i?tab=summary&timestamp=1529.0)
